principle: No feature ships until it survives the live user loop.
features_verified: Listening Lab has been rebuilt as Asset Lab in the active UI.
Asset Lab creates a signal asset with domain, entity, source, and raw signal.
Break Down Signal returns a map, key terms, concrete example, reuse context, and action-ready breakdown.
Saved Asset enters the asset library and linked memory ledger.
Command Center data planes expose clickable signal/route drilldowns.
Patterns headline the actual repeated signal/pattern.
Pattern cards can be recontextualized into action queue items.
Actions expose clickable source memory and similar-signal context.
